title: LifeSmart Colo Play White LS169
description:
COLO PLAY is a cyber-themed knob controller with a 
knob and four mechanical keyboard-style buttons. It 
is a desktop clock, a PC sub-screen, a keypad, and 
also displays the number of your social media 
followers. In addition, it is a Cololight remote control.Hardcore boot, full sense of ceremony
